title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 33–39, this part focuses on Yamato, Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet, another day where the waves of nostalgia come flooding in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: EVEN THOUGH OUR SHIP HAD CHANGED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: THE END WAS NOWHERE IN SIGHT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: :Or at least, that's what I thought...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 8 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
